---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
[Example: I'm always frustrated when ...]

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. What should it look like? How should it behave?

## Use Cases
Describe the scenarios where this feature would be useful.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Screenshots / Mockups
If applicable, add sketches, mockups, or screenshots to help explain.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the feature request here.
